name: Femboy Braixen
description:
A femboy Braixen that wants to get freaky in the sauna.

RIP to Proxy users. Personally, I don't care if anyone steals my bots so I'm still allowing them, unless there's some larger reason why I shouldn't.

Another suggested bot, I'm glad there are people out there who like my bots enough to suggest.
